name: outreach-review-notify
description: Finds drafted outreach items needing human review and posts Slack notifications with quick-action buttons. T27 adds GET /webhook/render-approval-form (this commit); T29 wires the approve/reject buttons. TODO(phase2): migrate notification log from outcomes to a dedicated notifications table. NOTE: Slack channel C0B4SUTP8R4 (#plotlens-outreach) is hardcoded because n8n 2.9.4 blocks $env access in node expressions (N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE default). To change the channel, update the Slack Notify node's channelId.value directly.

parameters.query:
SELECT oi.id AS outreach_item_id, oi.source_url, oi.source_platform,
       d.id AS preview_draft_id, d.draft_text AS preview_text, d.risk_score AS preview_risk_score
FROM outreach_items oi
JOIN drafts d ON d.outreach_item_id = oi.id AND d.variant = 'helpful_only'
WHERE oi.status='drafted'
  AND d.status='needs_human_review'
  AND oi.id NOT IN (
    SELECT (notes::jsonb->>'outreach_item_id')::bigint
    FROM outcomes
    WHERE notes::jsonb ? 'outreach_item_id' AND notes::jsonb->>'kind' = 'notified'
  )
ORDER BY oi.discovered_at
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO outcomes (publish_job_id, notes)
VALUES (NULL, jsonb_build_object('outreach_item_id', $1::bigint, 'kind', 'notified')::text);

WITH drafts_cte AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.variant, d.draft_text, d.risk_score, d.suggested_destination, d.suggested_post_type,
         oi.source_url, oi.source_platform, oi.id AS outreach_item_id
  FROM drafts d
  JOIN outreach_items oi ON oi.id = d.outreach_item_id
  WHERE oi.id = $1::bigint
    AND d.status = 'needs_human_review'
  ORDER BY d.variant
)
SELECT * FROM drafts_cte
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM drafts_cte);

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(r => r.id !== null && r.id !== undefined); if (!rows || rows.length === 0) { return [{json: {html: '

No pending drafts for this outreach_item

'}}]; } const item = rows[0]; // source_url + platform are the same for all three const escapeHtml = (s) => String(s ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c])); const safeUrl = (s) => /^https?:\/\//i.test(s ?? '') ? s : '#blocked-unsafe-url'; const variantBlock = (r) => `

${escapeHtml(r.variant)} risk ${r.risk_score}/100

`; const html = ` Approve outreach item #${item.outreach_item_id}

Outreach item #${item.outreach_item_id}

Source: ${escapeHtml(item.source_url)}

Platform: ${escapeHtml(item.source_platform)}

Variants (edit any, then choose which to approve)

${rows.map(variantBlock).join('')}




`; return [{json: {html}}];

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Build Approval').item.json.draft_id,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_by,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.decision,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.edited_text,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_destination,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_post_type,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approved_content_hash,
  $('Build Approval').item.json.approval_notes
] }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE drafts SET status = CASE
  WHEN $1::text = 'approved' THEN 'approved'
  WHEN $1::text = 'manual_only' THEN 'approved'
  WHEN $1::text = 'rejected' THEN 'rejected'
  ELSE status
END
WHERE id = $2::bigint;

UPDATE drafts SET status='rejected'
WHERE outreach_item_id = $3::bigint
  AND id <> $2::bigint
  AND status = 'needs_human_review'
  AND $1::text IN ('approved','manual_only','rejected');

UPDATE outreach_items SET status='reviewed'
WHERE id = $3::bigint
  AND $1::text IN ('approved','manual_only','rejected');

parameters.responseBody:
={{ `

Approval recorded

Decision: ${$('Build Approval').item.json.decision}

Approval ID: ${$('Insert Approval').item.json.id}

Back to form

` }}
